ab: auka yu isuwa?
en: Where are you going?

ab: auka ku i pan-kung-se mayaa kana sinsi.
en: I’m going to the office to see the teacher.

ab: auka isuwa i Kusiyang?
en: Where is Kusiyang going?

ab: auka matelra dra ubeubel taytaw.
en: He’s going to throw away the trash.

ab: ulraya isuwa i Kusiyang?
en: Where is Kusiyang?

ab: ulraya kana danaw dra lralranguyan, auka kurenanga kana marepaukauka dra melranguy an garemay.
ch: B:他在游泳池，他等一下要比賽游泳。
en: He’s at the swimming pool. He’s going to compete in a swimming competition later.

ab: ulraya isuwa i Nawinaw? auka kana maariari dra kabekas an garemay taytaw.
ch: A:Nawinaw在哪裡？她等一下要比賽跑步。
en: Where is Nawinaw? She’s going to compete in a running competition later.

ab: ulraya kana uwakasayan maradruk, kayku mayaa kantaw.
en: She’s in the auditorium. I’ll go call her.

ab: salrangana ta muka i renarenadran i!
en: Let’s go to the playground together.

ab: kayku driya tremimaa dra karealriyan, an garemay i muka ku lra mayaa kanu.
ch: B:我先去買午餐，等一下去找你。
en: I’ll go buy lunch first, and then I’ll meet you later.

ab: marenanga ta muka madrasa kana tabutabu i!
en: Let’s carry the lunch boxes together!

ab: uwa aya dra druma dra trau, auka ku mayaa kana sinsi.
ch: B:你找別人，我要去找老師。
en: You find someone else, I’m going to find the teacher.

ab: i Isaw i auka kurenanga kana merepaukauka dra kurukēt an uninan?
en: Is Isawco mpeting in croquet today?

ab: adri, auka kurenanga kana merepaukauka dra paselekaw dratu ikaasatr.
en: No, he’s competing in high jump.

ab: an marepaukauka dra rarenadran kana wari i kuwarenang yu dra marepaukauka?
ch: A:運動會那天你會上場比賽嗎？
en: Will you compete in the sports day?

ab: aiwa i! auka ku kurenanga kana maariari dra kabekas.
en: Yes, I’ll compete in running.

ab: an marepaukauka dra rarenadran kana wari i kuwarenang yu dra marepaukauka?
ch: A:運動會那天你會上場比賽嗎？
en: Will you compete in the sports day?

ab: auka ku kurenanga kana merepaukauka dra kurukēt.
en: I’ll compete in croquet.

ab: an marepaukauka dra rarenadran kandru na wari i kakakuda ta?
ch: A:我們運動會那天要做甚麼？
en: What will we do in the sports day?

ab: auka ta kurenanga kana merepaukauka dra makedrekedreng dra tuwasu.
en: We will compete in tug of war.

ab: naniwan ta dra aekanan an marepaukauka dra rarenadran?
ch: A:我們運動會要賣食物嗎？
en: Will we sell food at the sports day?

ab: adri, naniwan ta dra tabululr.
en: No, we will sell balloons.

ab: mualak yu dra asanga! makeser yu i!
ch: A:你獲得了第一名耶！真是厲害！
en: Congratulations on getting first place! You’re amazing!

ab: semangalan!
en: Thank you.
